data.title: Stablecoin regulated in the US: political and financial breakthrough
data.description:
The launch of a fully regulated stablecoin in the United States marks a paradigm shift for the crypto sector, amid political pressure, institutionalisation and new market balances.
source: https://en.spaziocrypto.com/stablecoins/stablecoin-regulated-in-the-us-political-and-financial-breakthrough/

data.title: 21Shares launches JitoSOL-based Solana staking ETP in Europe
data.description:
21Shares has launched a JitoSOL-based Solana staking ETP in Europe, as debates over yield-bearing crypto products continues globally.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/387614/21shares-launches-jitosol-based-solana-staking-etp-in-europe?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Hyperliquid leads BTC market depth, beating out Binance reserves
data.description:
Hyperliquid has more market depth for BTC within the 1% slippage range compared to Binance. Activity on Hyperliquid is also picking up after a boost from HIP-3 deployer-generated trading pairs.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/hyperliquid-leads-btc-market-depth/

data.title: Tesla Didn’t Sell Bitcoin But Still Took a $239M Hit
data.description:
Tesla kept its Bitcoin position unchanged throughout the fourth quarter of 2025, according to the company’s earnings report released on January 28, 2026. The firm maintained holdings of 11,509 BTC without executing any purchases or sales during the period, signaling continued commitment to its remaining digital asset exposure despite ongoing market volatility.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/tesla-didnt-sell-bitcoin-but-still-took-a-239m-hit/

data.title: Hong Kong-Based OSL Group Launches $200M Equity Raise for Stablecoin and Payments Push
data.description:
OSL Group, one of Asia's leading digital asset platforms, has announced a $200 million equity financing round as it accelerates its expansion across stablecoin trading and digital payments.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/osl-group-launches-200m-equity-raise-for-stablecoin-and-payments-push/

data.title: Citrea ZK-rollup launch stress tests scarce Bitcoin block space
data.description:
Citrea’s Bitcoin rollup has become a live experiment in whether BTC can support a full DeFi and stablecoin stack, and how much complexity Bitcoin should anchor at the base layer.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/citrea-bitcoin-rollup-is-stress-testing-block-space?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Dubai Insurance Launches Crypto Wallet for Premium Payments & Claims
data.description:
Dubai Insurance has introduced the first crypto-enabled digital wallet in the United Arab Emirates insurance sector. Enabling policyholders to pay premiums and receive claims settlements using digital assets. The solution, developed in partnership with Zodia Custody, aims to enhance security, transparency, and operational efficiency for crypto transactions tied to insurance services
source: https://www.techgaged.com/dubai-insurance-launches-crypto-wallet-for-premium-payments-claims/

data.title: ALT5 Sigma Approves $100 Million Stock Buyback Plan
data.description: ALT5 Sigma Corporation has announced the approval of a stock buyback plan worth up to $100 million, authorizing the repurchase of up to 50 million shares, which constitutes 40% of its total outstanding shares. According to PANews, the company aims to leverage its strong balance sheet and strategic partnership with World Liberty Financial (WLFI) to further acquire WLFI tokens. Currently, ALT5 holds approximately 7.3 billion WLFI tokens. The company plans to capitalize on market conditions to enhance the token's value and strengthen its asset base. Additionally, ALT5 has signed a $15 million loan agreement with WLFI to initiate these plans. CEO Tony Isaac expressed that these initiatives will create significant value for shareholders and demonstrate the company's strong confidence in its stock and strategy. Previously, ALT5 Sigma resolved issues related to the timely filing of financial reports with NASDAQ.

data.title: ByteDance and Alibaba to Launch New AI Model in Mid-February
data.description: ByteDance and Alibaba are set to unveil a new artificial intelligence model in mid-February. According to BlockBeats, this development comes as both companies continue to expand their technological capabilities in the AI sector. The launch is expected to enhance their competitive edge in the rapidly evolving field of artificial intelligence.

data.title: US President Trump reiterated his criticism of Federal Reserve Chairman Powell.
data.description: US President Trump reiterated his criticism of Federal Reserve Chairman Powell. (Regarding the Fed) "We deserve the lowest interest rates in the world. We should have much lower interest rates now." (Jinshi)

data.title: Escape Velocity Raises $62 Million for DePIN Crypto Networks
data.description: Escape Velocity, a cryptocurrency venture capital firm, has successfully raised $62 million to invest in DePIN crypto networks. According to BlockBeats, the funding will support projects in various sectors, including telescopes and solar energy. This move highlights the growing interest in decentralized infrastructure networks and their potential applications across different industries.

data.title: Trump Reiterates Criticism of Federal Reserve Chair Powell, Calls for Rate Cuts
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has once again expressed criticism towards Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell. According to BlockBeats, Trump reiterated his call for interest rate cuts, emphasizing that the United States should benefit from the lowest interest rates globally. He stated that the current rates should be significantly lower.

data.title: ALT5 Sigma announced that its board of directors has approved a strategic acquisition of more WLFI tokens on the open market.
data.description: According to market sources, ALT5 Sigma announced that its board of directors has approved a strategic acquisition of more WLFI tokens on the open market.

data.title: Bitcoin could 6x following Gold’s RSI, according to macro expert
data.description:
Gold’s momentum is reaching unprecedented levels, raising questions about what could come next not only for the precious metal but the crypto market as well, specifically Bitcoin (BTC). Namely, the gold price has now pushed its Relative Strength Index (RSI) above 91, a level that has been recorded only once before in history, December 1979, just before a prolonged consolidation phase.  Something similar also took place in August 2020, when gold again surged to record highs, just before consolidating and letting Bitcoin go on a nearly sixfold run over the subsequent cycle. Understandably, the historical parallel has left investors wondering whether gold may once again be nearing a consolidation phase and potentially set the stage for renewed upside in its digital counterpart
source: https://finbold.com/bitcoin-could-6x-following-golds-rsi-according-to-macro-expert/

data.title: Solana Loses Two-Thirds of Validators as Smaller Nodes Exit, Raising Centralization Concerns
data.description:
Solana has seen a steep decline in the number of validators securing the blockchain, a trend that industry participants say is being driven by rising costs for smaller operators.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/solana-loses-two-thirds-of-validators-as-smaller-nodes-exit-raising-centralization-concerns/

data.title: Cardano Faces Challenges Amid Weak February Returns
data.description: Cardano begins February with diminishing momentum after a robust January performance, encountering historically weak seasonal returns averaging -9.5% for the month. According to NS3.AI, a falling wedge pattern coupled with bullish RSI divergence suggests a possible 90% breakout. However, confirmation hinges on surpassing key resistance levels above $0.374 and ultimately $0.543. Despite some improvement in spot buying and Chaikin Money Flow, overall capital inflows remain subdued. This situation makes derivatives positioning and the potential for a short squeeze crucial for any acceleration in upward movement.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Considered for Inclusion in 401(k) Plans
data.description: Paul Atkins, a former SEC Commissioner, expressed on CNBC's Squawk Box that cryptocurrency should be allowed as an investment choice in 401(k) retirement plans. According to NS3.AI, Atkins highlighted the importance of this shift, indicating an increasing acceptance of digital currencies within mainstream financial systems. This move could expand the adoption of cryptocurrencies by incorporating them into retirement savings portfolios, offering investors more diverse options.

data.title: A whale deposited $1.6 million USDC into HyperLiquid and went long on copper with 4x leverage.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale (0xf6b...d52E) deposited $1.6 million USDC into HyperLiquid and opened a long position in copper with 4x leverage.

data.title: Bitcoin's Reliability as a Store of Value and Payment System Questioned
data.description: Bitcoin is facing scrutiny over its effectiveness as a reliable store of value and payment system. According to NS3.AI, despite its widespread recognition, Bitcoin has not attained the stability or utility anticipated by its supporters. This situation prompts concerns regarding its adoption and long-term viability in investment and transactional capacities.

data.title: Sygnum's Bitcoin Fund Secures $65 Million, Targets Steady Returns
data.description: Sygnum's newly launched bitcoin fund has successfully raised $65 million from investors interested in stable income opportunities. According to NS3.AI, the fund reported an 8.9% annualized net return in its first quarter. It is designed to deliver consistent annual returns of 8-10% through systematic arbitrage strategies. The fund's approach focuses on leveraging market inefficiencies to achieve its financial goals, appealing to investors seeking reliable performance in the volatile cryptocurrency market.
